name: Nonomi Izayoi
description: __Academy:__ Abydos High School __Year:__ 2nd Year __Height:__ 5'2" Izayoi Nonomi is one of the students studying in Abydos High School who wields a Machine Gun with green accents and the Abydos insignia. She has an emotional and gentle personality, and she serves as a mental support for the Committee, many of whom have extreme personalities. Despite not mentioning it herself, she comes from a wealthy family, and most of the snacks for the Council are funded by her.

name: Otohime
description: Queen Otohime is a goldfish mermaid and was the late queen consort of Ryugu Kingdom, the wife of Neptune, and the mother of Fukaboshi, Ryuboshi, Manboshi and Shirahoshi. First Appearance: Chapter 621; Episode 540 (Source: One Piece Wikia)

name: Reo Kakinoki
description: Reo is Hajime's friend and has a big obsession with paranormal themes, and proclaims himself as a respected paranormal researcher. However, whenever Reo finds a clue pertaining to the existence of supernatural entities, it seems that the clue turns against him. Like Hajime, he tries to be brave but is actually just a coward.

name: Ricky
description: Ricky is one of the side protagonists in the Shadows House series. He is a Living Doll working as a servant in the Shadows House and as a "face" of [Patrick Shadow](https://anilist.co/character/200311/Patrick). Ricky is known as being a very confident and self-centered person, even more so than his Master, Patrick. name: Rikako Honda
description: __Height:__ 158 cm (5'2") A girl from the same class as Nishi, with a dry, no-nonsense personality. She's logical and values efficiency in everything. She's close friends with Nishi and the only person Nishi communicates with normally.

name: Seigen Irako
description: Irako Seigen is introduced as Fujiki's opponent. He is a blind samurai with a very strange and terrifying sword technique.

name: Sensei
description: Master is a female employee of the Horse's Bone bookstore. She received her nickname "Master" when she first announced to the others her dream of surpassing a master mangaka one day. Master is actually a doujinshi mangaka in her spare time, drawing and writing under the pen name Jona Taro - who Umio is a big fan of. Appearance-wise she wears glasses and has long black hair. She lives alone in an apartment.

name: Serge Battour
nativeName: セルジュ・バトゥール
description: Serge is the son of a nobleman and a Romani prostitute. His father was killed in a war. The noble blood he inherited from him makes him proper, talented and filled with a sense of justice. This come to be something his roommate despises though it seems these characteristics are what prompted the head of the dorms to place him there.
mediaTitles: The Poem of Wind and Trees
searchTerms: セルジュ・バトゥール
The Poem of Wind and Trees

name: Shingo Wakamoto
description: Shingo is a blonde guy who looks like a delinquent. He has a crush on Anzu.

name: Silene
description: Once Amon's lover, Sirene is on a mission to destroy the being that took her beloved Amon away. Sirene has razor-sharp claws that can tear a man in two. She can also launch her arms at targets.

name: Simon Kagomura
description: **Height:** 175 cm [Maiko](https://anilist.co/character/284978/Maiko-Momoma)'s partner. Simon is cold to those he doesn't usually speak to, and can be scary at times. He takes his job seriously and understands how terrifying the world of Choujins truly is. He also believes that being a Choujin is "inconvenient by nature". ~!In Chapter 28, Simon shows off a much more friendly, optimistic side of his personality when helping [Tokio](https://anilist.co/character/224464/Tokio-Kurohara) learn how to

name: Sonia
description: Sonia is the granddaughter and assistant of Dr. Magnolia as well as Dande's childhood friend. Sonia and her partner Pokémon, Wanpachi, participated in the Gym Challenge with Dande, but eventually dropped out.

name: Tamaki Shishio
description: A first-year who came to the band club's welcome party, she kind of resembles Shiho

name: Urara
description: Urara is the deuteragonist of Ayashimon. She is an oni Ayashimon who is the founder and kumicho of the Urara Family, which consists of only her and Maruo Kaido. She is also secretly the illegitimate child of the late first chairman of the Enma Syndicate, Kio.

name: Ushii
description: __Height:__ 181 cm Ushii is presented as a stoic and levelheaded man, considered to be smart and quick witted by other warriors. He has a cold and analytical personality and looks at things with a logical outlook. He fought his first battle when he was five, killing everyone else. Has wanted to be hailed as a genius ever since. The name of his saber is Gobouken. While the saber itself isn't very special - it's just a regular mass-produced item - he wields it with great care. Despite looking thin

name: Wasuke Itadori
description: Yuji's Grandfather is shown to be a selfless, caring man who taught Yuji to help others. He was also short tempered and stubborn, to the point he would yell at Yuji for visiting him every day and buying him flowers. This temper meant that nobody else wanted to visit him and he tells his grandson to avoid dying alone.

name: Xiaomei
description: Xiaomei is shown to have a calm and serious disposition as well as knowledgeable due to her precognition abilities. Due to her precognition abilities not being able to tell a single outcome, it is shown that Xiaomei has an interest in watching people battle and this interest grows to the point where she becomes visibly excited and aroused.

name: Yui Saito
description: Yui Saito is Hideki's teacher who watches over him and the girls and becomes their club's advisor. She gives him advice on how to interact with girls and balance his gaming life. It is later revealed that she was the LA player Nekohime (猫姫), a catgirl who rejected Hideki's in-game proposal two years prior, stating that she was actually a guy.
